content: Routing hardening follow-up after v0.1.1: reduced unnecessary doglegs by treating same X/Y as valid unless it creates exact endpoint overlap, insufficient spacing, component intersection, or long segment overlap. Endpoint deconfliction is now scoped by node side, direct/low-bend routes are preferred before axis-conflict avoidance, and a final opposite-side straightening pass removes detours when a safe straight segment exists. Added layout regression for multi-outgoing screenflow-style routes. Verification: npm test -- --run test/layout.test.ts, npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, and npm run build all pass. Existing untracked reports/ left untouched.
